focus: Map current deep-research architecture and packet lifecycle
noveltyJustification: Established baseline architecture and active packet paths.

focus: Inspect deep-research config template for review leakage
noveltyJustification: Found cross-mode fields embedded in shared config template.

noveltyJustification: Identified resume/completed-session behavior without executable restart/fork branches.

noveltyJustification: Found UI offers restart/fork but no downstream branch execution.
ruledOut: Confirm restart branch implemented

focus: Inspect state/dashboards for segment and convergence-signal persistence
noveltyJustification: Documented metadata promised in references but not emitted consistently.

focus: Review deep-research agent contract (Codex TOML) for reducer gaps
noveltyJustification: Confirmed multi-file mutable state without per-iteration reducer contract.
ruledOut: JSONL is sole source during loop

focus: Consolidate research-mode root causes and hypotheses
noveltyJustification: Stabilized root-cause cluster before switching to review lane.
ruledOut: No historical fragmentation in research mode

focus: Map sk-deep-review state naming contract across SKILL/README
noveltyJustification: Found deep-review vs deep-research file-name split in same skill package.
ruledOut: Review naming fully canonical

focus: Inspect review YAML canonical/legacy migration and pause sentinel paths
noveltyJustification: Detected deep-research-named review state and pause sentinel mismatch.
ruledOut: Pause sentinel naming consistent everywhere

focus: Review convergence expectations vs in-loop finding registry
noveltyJustification: Verified convergence expects richer finding state than loop persists during iterations.
ruledOut: In-loop canonical finding registry exists

focus: Check completed-session behavior in deep-review auto/confirm
noveltyJustification: Completed-session jumps to synthesis, blocking lineage continuation.
ruledOut: Completed sessions always continue loop

focus: Inspect review strategy mutability and corruption safeguards
noveltyJustification: Strategy is mutable shared state with limited reconciliation checks.
ruledOut: Strict strategy-state consistency validation exists

focus: Consolidate review-mode root causes and migration needs
noveltyJustification: Locked review lane root-cause model and migration constraints.
ruledOut: Review issues are isolated to docs

focus: Audit command prompt contract for deep-research setup and mode boundaries
noveltyJustification: Prompt enforces setup but diverges from some skill/docs surfaces.
ruledOut: Prompt and runtime docs fully aligned

focus: Audit deep-review YAML legacy migration design for transferable research improvements
noveltyJustification: Review migration step is robust and reusable for research-mode rehome.
ruledOut: Research migration step already present

focus: Audit research confirm post-iteration gate freshness
noveltyJustification: Confirmed stale gate context before dashboard refresh.
ruledOut: Post-iteration gate always reads fresh strategy

focus: Audit references claiming live lifecycle events vs executable YAML
noveltyJustification: References overclaim runtime behavior for several event types.
ruledOut: Event contract fully implemented

focus: Audit review workflow source imports (research references vs review references)
noveltyJustification: Review workflows still import research references/config templates.
ruledOut: Review workflow fully self-owned

focus: Synthesize workflow-surface findings into patch cluster
noveltyJustification: Stabilized high-priority command/workflow remediation set.
ruledOut: Single-file patch can solve all workflow issues

focus: Runtime parity sweep: codex/opencode/claude/gemini orchestrate contracts
noveltyJustification: Found real behavior divergence in bootstrap routing and dispatch tooling.
ruledOut: Runtime parity differences are cosmetic

focus: Bootstrap payload parity across context-prime definitions
noveltyJustification: OpenCode includes structural context section omitted in other runtimes.
ruledOut: Context-prime output schema is identical across runtimes

focus: Gemini orchestrate capability contract sanity check
noveltyJustification: Gemini orchestrate header exposes only read tool despite dispatch instructions.
ruledOut: Gemini orchestrator is fully dispatch-capable

focus: Runtime parity synthesis and CI parity-gate proposal
noveltyJustification: Finalized parity enforcement model and release gates.
ruledOut: Manual parity checks are sufficient long term

focus: External benchmark 1: Auto-Deep-Research-main pattern extraction
noveltyJustification: Strong orchestration/compatibility ideas but weak historical ledger model.
ruledOut: Auto-Deep-Research has first-class evolving research DB

focus: External benchmark 2: AutoAgent-main pattern extraction
noveltyJustification: Useful triage handoff and function-call fallback with retrieval caches.
ruledOut: AutoAgent retry loop is enough for lineage

focus: External benchmark 3: autoresearch-master loop model extraction
noveltyJustification: Accept/reject branch loop is strong for autonomous iteration discipline.
ruledOut: autoresarch loop provides transferable audit database model

focus: Non-hook compatibility contract draft and constraints
noveltyJustification: Defined file-based bootstrap invariants independent of hook injection.
ruledOut: Hook-only startup assumptions are acceptable

focus: Unified target architecture synthesis (lineage, reducer, parity)
noveltyJustification: Integrated all lanes into one implementation architecture.
ruledOut: Patch individual defects without canonical model

focus: Migration and rollout sequencing with risk controls
noveltyJustification: Finalized phased rollout and back-compat guardrails.
ruledOut: Big-bang migration

focus: Confirm-mode session classification and lifecycle handoff integrity
noveltyJustification: Identified executable gap between resume options and workflow branches.
ruledOut: UI options imply executable lifecycle implementation

focus: Auto-mode completed-session behavior and lineage continuation limits
noveltyJustification: Confirmed completed-session path routes to synthesis without continuation branch.
ruledOut: completed-session auto-resume continues loop by default

focus: Reference-vs-workflow lifecycle contract for restart/fork
noveltyJustification: Mapped conceptual restart references against non-executable confirm flow.
ruledOut: restart/fork are fully implemented in active workflows

focus: Event model adequacy for lineage/generation tracking
noveltyJustification: Event catalog lacks genealogy keys despite robust operational events.
ruledOut: existing event schema is sufficient for lineage graphing

focus: Iteration artifact schema depth versus canonical reducer requirements
noveltyJustification: Clarified reconstruction strengths and unavoidable lossiness without reducer.
ruledOut: write-once iteration files can replace normalized registry

focus: Convergence and guard override resilience
noveltyJustification: Validated guard override behavior but exposed non-lineage guard blind spots.
ruledOut: current guards cover lifecycle correctness

focus: Entrypoint prompt contract vs executable workflow semantics
noveltyJustification: Confirmed setup rigor but lifecycle semantics remain underbound to YAML.
ruledOut: entrypoint setup guarantees lifecycle executability

focus: Deep-review naming drift matrix across SKILL/README/references/YAML
noveltyJustification: Established full cross-surface drift map for review artifact names.
ruledOut: naming drift is cosmetic only

focus: Pause sentinel drift and operational risk
noveltyJustification: Proved sentinel naming mismatch can break operator pause/resume behavior.
ruledOut: all review surfaces agree on pause sentinel

focus: Manual playbook alignment with active review contract
noveltyJustification: Found test scenarios institutionalizing one side of naming drift.
ruledOut: manual playbook currently detects naming drift

focus: Review migration/rehome conflict robustness
noveltyJustification: Documented strong rehome behavior with declarative-vs-shell conflict gap.
ruledOut: migration command path is conflict-complete

focus: Orchestrator bootstrap parity across runtimes
noveltyJustification: Reconfirmed first-turn bootstrap parity gaps between runtime mirrors.
ruledOut: orchestrator bootstrap contract is uniform across runtimes

focus: Gemini orchestrator capability declaration mismatch
noveltyJustification: Declared tool list cannot fulfill documented task-delegation behavior.
ruledOut: Gemini orchestrate tool surface matches contract text

focus: Context-prime output schema parity
noveltyJustification: Identified structural context block divergence in prime package templates.
ruledOut: context-prime output schema is shared across mirrors

focus: Auto-Deep-Research retry and sender compatibility patterns
noveltyJustification: Extracted portable runtime hardening patterns for multi-provider support.
ruledOut: external runtime hardening offers no transferable value

focus: Function-call converter constraints and failure modes
noveltyJustification: Detailed safe conversion mechanics and one-tool-call limitation impacts.
ruledOut: non-function fallback conversion is trivial

focus: External memory layer capability vs lineage requirements
noveltyJustification: Confirmed vector memory strengths and genealogy model limitations.
ruledOut: external memory class already models lineage

focus: AutoAgent runtime adaptation divergence
noveltyJustification: Captured Gemini adaptation benefit and retry-policy inconsistency risk.
ruledOut: AutoAgent reliability posture is uniformly stronger

focus: AutoAgent memory and loop semantics for continuity
noveltyJustification: Separated robust retry behavior from weak lineage persistence semantics.
ruledOut: external retry loops inherently provide historical continuity

focus: Autoresearch loop discipline and governance transferability
noveltyJustification: Isolated keep/discard governance patterns suitable for bounded adoption.
ruledOut: infinite autonomous loop policy should be adopted directly

focus: Canonical lineage schema proposal
noveltyJustification: Produced minimal backward-compatible lineage key set and event extensions.
ruledOut: lineage can be inferred reliably without explicit IDs

focus: Deterministic reducer and ownership boundaries
noveltyJustification: Defined machine-owned registry and artifact ownership split.
ruledOut: strategy markdown alone should remain canonical state

focus: Executable lifecycle branch design (resume/restart/fork/continue)
noveltyJustification: Converted lifecycle semantics into concrete branch behaviors and archive model.
ruledOut: ad-hoc subfolder creation is sufficient lifecycle handling

focus: Naming unification migration window design
noveltyJustification: Defined dual-read/single-write migration and sentinel compatibility window.
ruledOut: immediate hard rename without compatibility reads

focus: Runtime parity gate suite design
noveltyJustification: Specified static parity assertions for orchestrate/context-prime mirrors.
ruledOut: manual parity checks are enough at release time

focus: Hook/non-hook validation matrix design
noveltyJustification: Mapped lifecycle compatibility scenarios and required evidence outputs.
ruledOut: hook-only regression testing provides sufficient confidence

focus: P0 execution unit decomposition
noveltyJustification: Produced low-risk sequencing from contract freeze to reducer rollout.
ruledOut: single mega-patch rollout

focus: Risk and rollback controls by phase
noveltyJustification: Defined rollback checkpoints and migration safety triggers.
ruledOut: forward-only migration with no checkpoints

focus: Release readiness criteria and blocking metrics
noveltyJustification: Converted recommendations into objective release blocking criteria.
ruledOut: subjective release judgment without hard gates

focus: Wave-2 closure and integrated roadmap
noveltyJustification: Integrated all lanes into final implementation-ready synthesis.
ruledOut: further broad discovery before implementation planning

focus: Auto-Deep-Research top-level launch path and startup contract.
noveltyJustification: Mapped how a simple CLI hides a large bootstrap path without changing the disk-first truth model.
ruledOut: bootstrap should be the canonical research state

focus: Retry logic and provider compatibility in the core model call path.
noveltyJustification: Confirmed concrete retry, sender-compatibility, and capability-gating patterns worth borrowing.
ruledOut: retry logic is mostly decorative

focus: Function-call conversion bridge between function and non-function models.
noveltyJustification: Extracted strict fallback-bridge lessons and their drift risks.
ruledOut: non-function models require a separate product path

focus: Structured results, tool output handling, and multimodal handoff behavior.
noveltyJustification: Clarified how structured results and graceful tool degradation improve orchestration portability.
ruledOut: freeform strings are enough for durable handoffs

focus: System triage and explicit agent transfer graph.
noveltyJustification: Showed explicit handoff graphs are reusable even when lineage storage is absent.
ruledOut: retry loops imply historical continuation

focus: Environment separation and explicit runtime context injection.
noveltyJustification: Isolated environment-lane separation as a strong import candidate for CLI portability.
ruledOut: runtime resources should be inferred implicitly

focus: Event engine, group dispatch, and queue-based orchestration.
noveltyJustification: Confirmed event/queue orchestration patterns are strong control-flow references, not lineage storage models.
ruledOut: control-flow events alone reconstruct research ancestry

focus: Registry metadata and recursive workflow discovery.
noveltyJustification: Separated extension/registry metadata value from startup fragility risks.
ruledOut: recursive discovery is sufficient parity protection

focus: Logging, replayability, and source-level provenance.
noveltyJustification: Showed traces are excellent for postmortems but insufficient as canonical findings history.
ruledOut: rich logs can replace a findings registry

focus: Portable lessons from Auto-Deep-Research-main for the internal research/review system.
noveltyJustification: Closed the repo-specific lane with a clean import-vs-avoidance boundary.
ruledOut: the external repo can be adopted as an architectural template wholesale

focus: AutoAgent provider compatibility rules and runtime capability gating.
noveltyJustification: Confirmed AutoAgent's strongest reusable idea is provider capability normalization.
ruledOut: provider behavior should stay as scattered string checks

focus: AutoAgent function-call fallback bridge for non-function models.
noveltyJustification: Validated the bridge and surfaced its markup/regex fragility.
ruledOut: fallback bridges are robust without drift tests

focus: AutoAgent agent creation, update, and orchestrator generation.
noveltyJustification: Extracted create-then-run validation as a strong self-modifying workflow pattern.
ruledOut: static templates alone are enough for generated-agent safety

focus: AutoAgent workflow creation and event-driven orchestration.
noveltyJustification: Showed explicit workflow/event forms are reusable for auditable branching.
ruledOut: workflow transitions can stay implicit

focus: AutoAgent tool catalog management and third-party API documentation retrieval.
noveltyJustification: Confirmed tool-catalog protection and external-doc grounding are worth borrowing.
ruledOut: generated tools should bypass a controlled gate

focus: AutoAgent CLI mode routing and user-facing orchestration.
noveltyJustification: Mapped intent-based CLI mode routing as a user-facing clarity win.
ruledOut: one monolithic entry path is always simpler for operators

focus: AutoAgent retry loop and escalation behavior in the client runner.
noveltyJustification: Clarified bounded escalation as a better pattern than infinite retries.
ruledOut: escalation policy does not need explicit state

focus: AutoAgent system triage and multi-agent handoff model.
noveltyJustification: Confirmed named handoffs can be explicit without yet becoming genealogy.
ruledOut: handoff graphs automatically create durable lineage history

focus: AutoAgent memory and lookup surfaces for reusable knowledge.
noveltyJustification: Reconfirmed retrieval memory is useful for generation but not enough for continuity.
ruledOut: search-oriented memory solves long-running research continuity

focus: AutoAgent synthesis: what is worth borrowing for the internal deep-research/deep-review system.
noveltyJustification: Closed the AutoAgent lane with a precise transferable-pattern set.
ruledOut: prompt history and generated files are enough for long-term continuity

focus: Autoresearch's core contract: one mutable file, one fixed metric, one lightweight instruction surface.
noveltyJustification: Established small mutable surface as a first-class loop-quality feature.
ruledOut: a broader mutable surface always improves autonomy

focus: Branch identity and append-only result logging as the experiment ledger.
noveltyJustification: Extracted branch-per-run plus append-only logging as a clean experimentation ledger pattern.
ruledOut: operators can infer experiment history without a ledger

focus: The fixed 5-minute budget and why time-boxed experiments stay comparable.
noveltyJustification: Confirmed time-boxed comparability as a strong discipline pattern.
ruledOut: more flexible runtime budgets are always better for evaluation

focus: The train.py knob surface: a small number of high-leverage controls.
noveltyJustification: Showed a small deterministic knob surface can still support rich iteration.
ruledOut: high-leverage systems require many mutable files

focus: Optimizer design as a pattern for machine-owned state.
noveltyJustification: Reframed optimizer partitions as a model for explicit machine-owned state boundaries.
ruledOut: dynamic state must become opaque as systems grow

focus: Progress-based schedules and phase-aware control.
noveltyJustification: Extracted phase-aware control as a simpler alternative to large scheduler frameworks.
ruledOut: phase-aware control requires a heavy framework

focus: Fixed preprocessing and immutable evaluation as the trust boundary.
noveltyJustification: Clarified immutable evaluation as the real trust anchor in iterative systems.
ruledOut: the mutable loop should also own the scoring boundary

focus: Fork guidance and compatibility overlays without core contract bloat.
noveltyJustification: Separated compatibility overlays from core semantics in a way that fits multi-runtime support.
ruledOut: special-case compatibility belongs in the core contract

focus: The simplicity criterion as a real decision rule.
noveltyJustification: Confirmed simplicity can be an enforceable decision rule, not just a slogan.
ruledOut: small wins justify arbitrary complexity growth

focus: Integrated synthesis: what autoresearch-master teaches the internal deep-research/deep-review system.
noveltyJustification: Closed the external wave by turning discipline lessons into internal architecture priorities.
ruledOut: autoresearch solves durable research or review lineage history
